rewritten_query: WITH filtered_parts AS (     SELECT p_partkey     FROM part     WHERE p_type = 'ECONOMY PLATED STEEL' ), america_region AS (     SELECT r_regionkey     FROM region     WHERE r_name = 'AMERICA' ), filtered_orders AS (     SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey, EXTRACT(year FROM o_orderdate) AS o_year     FROM orders     WHERE o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31' ) SELECT      o_year,      SUM(CASE WHEN n2.n_name = 'CANADA' THEN l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) ELSE 0 END) /      SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS mkt_share  FROM filtered_parts JOIN lineitem ON filtered_parts.p_partkey = lineitem.l_partkey JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey JOIN filtered_orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = filtered_orders.o_orderkey JOIN customer ON filtered_orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey JOIN nation n1 ON customer.c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey JOIN america_region ON n1.n_regionkey = america_region.r_regionkey JOIN nation n2 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey GROUP BY o_year  ORDER BY o_year;

rewritten_query: WITH europe_nations AS (     SELECT n.n_nationkey, n.n_name     FROM nation n     JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey     WHERE r.r_name = 'EUROPE' ), filtered_parts AS (     SELECT p_partkey     FROM part     WHERE p_type = 'SMALL ANODIZED TIN' ) SELECT     o_year,     SUM(volume) FILTER (WHERE nation = 'FRANCE') / SUM(volume) AS mkt_share FROM (     SELECT         EXTRACT(year FROM o.o_orderdate) AS o_year,         l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS volume,         n2.n_name AS nation     FROM filtered_parts p     JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey     JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey     JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'     JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey     JOIN europe_nations n1 ON c.c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey     JOIN nation n2 ON s.s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey ) AS all_nations GROUP BY o_year ORDER BY o_year;

original_query: select sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly from lineitem, part where p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#35' and p_container = 'LG PKG' and l_quantity < ( select 0.2 * avg(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = p_partkey );
rewritten_query: WITH filtered_parts AS (     SELECT p_partkey     FROM part     WHERE p_brand = 'Brand#35' AND p_container = 'LG PKG' ), part_avg AS (     SELECT l.l_partkey, 0.2 * AVG(l.l_quantity) AS avg_qty     FROM lineitem l     JOIN filtered_parts fp ON l.l_partkey = fp.p_partkey     GROUP BY l.l_partkey ) SELECT SUM(l.l_extendedprice) / 7.0 AS avg_yearly FROM lineitem l JOIN part_avg pa ON l.l_partkey = pa.l_partkey WHERE l.l_quantity < pa.avg_qty;

original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'burnished%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1996-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1996-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'GERMANY' order by s_name;
rewritten_query: WITH filtered_parts AS (     SELECT p_partkey     FROM part     WHERE p_name LIKE 'burnished%' ), lineitem_sum AS (     SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, 0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS total_half     FROM lineitem     WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01'       AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01'     GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey ) SELECT s_name, s_address FROM supplier JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey WHERE nation.n_name = 'GERMANY'   AND EXISTS (     SELECT 1     FROM partsupp     JOIN filtered_parts ON partsupp.ps_partkey = filtered_parts.p_partkey     JOIN lineitem_sum ON partsupp.ps_partkey = lineitem_sum.l_partkey                      AND partsupp.ps_suppkey = lineitem_sum.l_suppkey     WHERE partsupp.ps_availqty > lineitem_sum.total_half       AND partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey   ) ORDER BY s_name;

original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'spring%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1997-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1997-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'KENYA' order by s_name;
rewritten_query: WITH lineitem_agg AS (     SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, 0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS half_sum     FROM lineitem     WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'     AND l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'     GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey ) SELECT s.s_name, s.s_address FROM supplier s JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey AND n_name = 'KENYA' WHERE EXISTS (     SELECT 1     FROM partsupp ps     JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey AND p.p_name LIKE 'spring%'     JOIN lineitem_agg la ON ps.ps_partkey = la.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = la.l_suppkey     WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey     AND ps.ps_availqty > la.half_sum ) ORDER BY s.s_name;

original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'burlywood%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' order by s_name;
rewritten_query: WITH nation_eth AS (     SELECT n_nationkey     FROM nation     WHERE n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' ), part_burly AS (     SELECT p_partkey     FROM part     WHERE p_name LIKE 'burlywood%' ), lineitem_sum AS (     SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, 0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS half_sum_quantity     FROM lineitem     WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'        AND l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'     GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey ), qualified_partsupp AS (     SELECT ps_suppkey     FROM partsupp     JOIN part_burly ON ps_partkey = p_partkey     JOIN lineitem_sum ON ps_partkey = l_partkey AND ps_suppkey = l_suppkey     WHERE ps_availqty > half_sum_quantity ) SELECT s_name, s_address FROM supplier JOIN nation_eth ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE s_suppkey IN (SELECT ps_suppkey FROM qualified_partsupp) ORDER BY s_name;

rewritten_query: SELECT s_name, COUNT(*) AS numwait FROM supplier, lineitem l1, orders, nation WHERE s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey   AND o_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey   AND o_orderstatus = 'F'   AND l1.l_receiptdate > l1.l_commitdate   AND EXISTS (     SELECT *     FROM lineitem l2     WHERE l2.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey       AND l2.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey   )   AND NOT EXISTS (     SELECT *     FROM lineitem l3     WHERE l3.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey       AND l3.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey       AND l3.l_receiptdate > l3.l_commitdate   )   AND s_nationkey = n_nationkey   AND n_name = 'INDONESIA' GROUP BY s_name ORDER BY numwait DESC, s_name LIMIT 100;

original_query: select cntrycode, count(*) as numcust, sum(c_acctbal) as totacctbal from ( select substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) as cntrycode, c_acctbal from customer where substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) in ('17', '22', '12', '18', '34', '25', '16') and c_acctbal > ( select avg(c_acctbal) from customer where c_acctbal > 0.00 and substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) in ('17', '22', '12', '18', '34', '25', '16') ) and not exists ( select * from orders where o_custkey = c_custkey ) ) as custsale group by cntrycode order by cntrycode;
rewritten_query: WITH filtered_customers AS (     SELECT          SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM 1 FOR 2) AS cntrycode,          c_acctbal,          c_custkey     FROM customer     WHERE SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM 1 FOR 2) IN ('17','22','12','18','34','25','16') ), avg_balance AS (     SELECT AVG(c_acctbal) AS avg_bal     FROM filtered_customers     WHERE c_acctbal > 0.00 ) SELECT      cntrycode,      COUNT(*) AS numcust,      SUM(c_acctbal) AS totacctbal FROM filtered_customers WHERE c_acctbal > (SELECT avg_bal FROM avg_balance) AND NOT EXISTS (     SELECT 1     FROM orders     WHERE o_custkey = filtered_customers.c_custkey ) GROUP BY cntrycode ORDER BY cntrycode;

rewritten_query: WITH filtered_customers AS (     SELECT          substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) as cntrycode,         c_acctbal,         c_custkey     FROM customer     WHERE substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) IN ('14', '22', '24', '26', '30', '31', '34') ), avg_balance AS (     SELECT avg(c_acctbal) as avg_val     FROM filtered_customers     WHERE c_acctbal > 0.00 ) SELECT      cntrycode,     count(*) as numcust,     sum(c_acctbal) as totacctbal FROM filtered_customers fc WHERE      fc.c_acctbal > (SELECT avg_val FROM avg_balance)     AND NOT EXISTS (         SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.o_custkey = fc.c_custkey     ) GROUP BY cntrycode ORDER BY cntrycode;
